title: OOMKilled — Container Memory Limit Exceeded
summary: Container was killed by the kernel OOM (Out of Memory) killer because it exceeded its memory limit.
likely_causes: Memory limit set too low for the workload
Sudden traffic spike causing higher memory usage
diagnostic_steps: Check recent deployments for memory limit changes

action_params.note: Scale up to distribute load. Also consider increasing memory limits in deployment spec.

escalate_if: Memory limits already set high (>2Gi) and still OOMKilling
Multiple pods across different nodes OOMKilling simultaneously
